name: || Moonshine ||
description:
Just a quick bot for a sultry, drunk lil cat. First of what I hope to be many! <3
(Funnily enough, making a feral cat is harder than I thought.)

Of course, this character and any art I may use of her belongs to Miso Souperstar, so if they ever happen to ask for this to be taken down, I'll make sure it's taken down quick. Check their art out, in any case!!!
creator: razzldazzlrose
